moves.headline: ACM dropped its AI writing-disclosure requirement
moves.detail: Writing-assistance disclosure no longer required; research-use must still be described in Methods.

moves.headline: Georgia Tech published a draft generative-AI policy
moves.detail: Core scholarly contributions must stay under full human direction; effective date TBD.

moves.headline: Index baseline set — 51 institutions coded
moves.detail: Mean CA 9.8/12. Weekly scan now live; new and changed policies append here.
